subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The contents of thy letter brought joy to 'Abdu'l-Bahá, for it betokened the flame of the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار حقیقی عبدالبهاء را مضمون نامه مسرور نمود زیرا دلالت بر شعله نور هدایت
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
